summary: Corrected implementation plan V3 addressing all 3 user concerns: (1) DSPy is ALWAYS the framework for both models - prompt enhancers inject model-specific text INTO DSPy signatures, not bypassing them. Both models produce identical output schema. (2) Full E2E flow understanding validated from 12+ source files and 8 artifacts. (3) CSV/Excel detailed metrics report added as a new output alongside the confusion matrix PNG.
